task_description: Add three new car track pieces: BRAKE (slows the car down, useful before corners), GIANT_LOOP (3x bigger than current loop - taller and longer), and GIANT_JUMP (wider gap than current jump).

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly. All 219 tests pass (207 original + 12 new). Tests cover brake physics (speed reduction, no negative v2, boostersUsed not incremented), giant loop speed gate (fails with low speed, succeeds with high speed), and path geometry (endpoints, continuity, monotonicity, peak heights).
